mapper.sql: select b.bed_id, b.institution_id, b.room_number, b.bed_number, b.bed_type, b.bed_status, b.price, b.self_care_price, b.half_care_price, b.full_care_price, b.member_fee, b.deposit_fee, b.floor_number, b.room_area, b.has_bathroom, b.has_balcony, b.facilities, b.create_by, b.create_time, b.update_by, b.update_time, b.remark, i.institution_name from bed_info b left join pension_institution i on b.institution_id = i.institution_id
mapper.select: where b.institution_id = #{institutionId} and b.bed_status = '0' order by b.floor_number, b.room_number, b.bed_number
mapper.insert:
insert into bed_info
institution_id, room_number, bed_number, bed_type, bed_status, price, self_care_price, half_care_price, full_care_price, member_fee, deposit_fee, floor_number, room_area, has_bathroom, has_balcony, facilities, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark,
#{institutionId}, #{roomNumber}, #{bedNumber}, #{bedType}, #{bedStatus}, #{price}, #{selfCarePrice}, #{halfCarePrice}, #{fullCarePrice}, #{memberFee}, #{depositFee}, #{floorNumber}, #{roomArea}, #{hasBathroom}, #{hasBalcony}, #{facilities}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, #{remark},
mapper.update: update bed_info set bed_status = #{bedStatus} where bed_id = #{bedId}
mapper.delete:
delete from bed_info where bed_id in
#{bedId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) as totalBeds, COUNT(CASE WHEN bed_status = '0' THEN 1 END) as availableBeds FROM bed_info WHERE institution_id = #{institutionId}

SELECT COUNT(1) > 0 FROM ( SELECT 1 FROM elder_check_in WHERE bed_id = #{bedId} AND check_in_status = '1' UNION ALL SELECT 1 FROM bed_allocation WHERE bed_id = #{bedId} AND allocation_status = '1' ) AS t
